snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

¬© 2026 ClassX Presentation

OSR Digital is one of the largest digital and physical (CD, VCD, DVD) movie distribution companies in Nepal. Now, It stands out as a prominent distributor of super-hit Nepali movie entertainment content on its YouTube channel in the country. The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: Vadh 2 - Official Trailer | Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta | Jaspal Singh Sandhu | Luv Films | 6th Feb
snippet.description:
An old prison guard- Shambhunath Mishra (Sanjay Mishra) and a jail inmate- Manju Singh (Neena Gupta) share a bond forged behind prison walls. 

When their ordinary lives are pulled into a moral conflict and truth refuses to surface, they stand at the centre of a choice that has consequences.

#Vadh2 #SanjayMishra #NeenaGupta

A Luv Films presentation, Vadh 2 is written and directed by Jaspal Singh Sandhu and produced by Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg. The film is slated for a theatrical release on 6th February 2026.

Starring: Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta with Kumud Mishra, Amitt K. Singh, Akshay Dogra, Shilpa Shukla & Yogita Bihani
Written & Directed By: Jaspal Singh Sandhu
Produced By: Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

en-US.title: Vadh 2 - Official Trailer | Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta | Jaspal Singh Sandhu | Luv Films | 6th Feb
en-US.description:
An old prison guard- Shambhunath Mishra (Sanjay Mishra) and a jail inmate- Manju Singh (Neena Gupta) share a bond forged behind prison walls. 

When their ordinary lives are pulled into a moral conflict and truth refuses to surface, they stand at the centre of a choice that has consequences.

#Vadh2 #SanjayMishra #NeenaGupta

A Luv Films presentation, Vadh 2 is written and directed by Jaspal Singh Sandhu and produced by Luv Ranjan and Ankur Garg. The film is slated for a theatrical release on 6th February 2026.

Starring: Sanjay Mishra, Neena Gupta with Kumud Mishra, Amitt K. Singh, Akshay Dogra, Shilpa Shukla & Yogita Bihani
Written & Directed By: Jaspal Singh Sandhu
Produced By: Luv Ranjan & Ankur Garg

snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldnвАЩt resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

snippet.title: Saraswati Mantra | Om Saraswati Namo Namah | Saraswati Vandana | Saraswati Puja | Master Your Mind
snippet.description:
Experience the divine power of the Saraswati Mantra, a sacred Vedic chant dedicated to Goddess SaraswatiвАФthe eternal source of wisdom, intelligence, creativity, and clarity of thought. This mantra is traditionally known to enhance learning, focus, communication skills, and decision-making abilities, which are essential foundations for achieving success in modern life, including career growth, financial planning, and wealth creation.

In todayвАЩs fast-paced world of technology, luxury lifestyle, high-performance careers, and global financial markets, mental clarity and disciplined thinking are more valuable than ever. Regular listening to the Saraswati Mantra helps calm the mind, sharpen analytical skills, and align your thoughts toward positive outcomes. A focused mind is crucial for excelling in investment strategies, stock market analysis, business leadership, entrepreneurship, and long-term financial stability.

Many successful individuals across the world believe that spiritual discipline complements material growth. When your mind is balanced, you make wiser choicesвАФwhether itвАЩs related to personal finance, wealth management, real estate investment, or building assets that support a premium lifestyle. Listening to this mantra during meditation, work, or study can support better concentration, improved productivity, and confident communicationвАФskills valued in corporate careers, high-income professions, and global businesses.

This devotional audio is ideal for those aspiring to grow in financial wealth, career success, and intellectual excellence, while remaining spiritually grounded. It resonates strongly with audiences interested in luxury cars, automobiles, high-end brands, financial freedom, passive income, and smart money habits. A calm and intelligent mindset also supports better judgment when dealing with banking, insurance, mutual funds, cryptocurrency awareness, and international investments.

Listening to the Saraswati Mantra daily can inspire discipline, creativity, and confidenceвАФqualities that align naturally with success in business growth, startup ecosystems, digital marketing, global employment opportunities, and lifestyle goals. Whether you are a student, professional, entrepreneur, or investor, this mantra helps cultivate inner strength that supports both spiritual peace and material progress.

рЯМЄ Listen with devotion
рЯМЄ Chant along or play during work or meditation
рЯМЄ Maintain a positive intention for knowledge, growth, and prosperity

May Goddess Saraswati bless you with wisdom that leads to meaningful success, balanced wealth, and a fulfilled life

Title :- Saraswati Mantra
Singer, Composition, Lyrics :- Sohini mishra 
Rhythm :- Shreedhara Chari, Shashikant Sharma 
Flute :- Sandip Kulkarni 
Sitar :- Umashankar Shukla 
Programming :- Raju rao 
Recorded at :- DAC Studio 
Recordist and Mix Mastered by :- Himanshu Dipak
Video :- Mindpro Agency

snippet.description:
Times Music presents the official full video song вАЬQuboolвАЭ from the movie Haq. With heartfelt lyrics & soulful vocals, Qubool captures the raw essence of love.

Whether you're in love, healing, or simply a fan of meaningful love songs, 'Qubool' is a song that speaks to the heart. It's the kind of track youвАЩll want to put on repeat.

Lyrics Of Song вАШQuboolвАЩ
 
Mila Asmaan Se Koi Noor Kohinoor Dastoor Mera
Lo Aaj Se Hua Main Sadiyon Ko Tera
 
Dekho Zara Dekho Naam Tera Likha Hai
Mera Hai Jo Mera Sab Tera Ho Chuka Hai
 
Dil Pe Ab Na Zor Koi
Har Qadam Teri Or Hai
Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Ab Phool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
Har Saans Hai Khushboo Bhari
Har Raasta Qubool Hai
 
Koi Shart Ho

Qubool Teri Zid Hai Saari
Saari Baatein Qubool Hain
Qubool Saare Din Tumhaare
Siyah Raatein Qubool Hain
 
Tu Saaye-Baan Tu, Teri Chaanv Mein Khud Ko Bhulakar Jhoom Loon
Yoon Tera Hoon, Tu Dard De To Dard Ko Bhi Choom Loon
Muskuraana Hai Tujhi Se Tujhse hi Aaraam hai
Tu Nahi To Main Nahi Hoon
Zindagi Tere Naam Hai
Tu Na To Main Bemaaine
Hona Mera Hi Fizool Hai
Koi Shart Ho Ya Dard Ho
Yeh Raabta Qubool Hai
 
Hai Ishq Mein Jab Doobe Hum
Gham Bhi Mile To Kaisa Gham
Tera Sahi Tera Ghalat
Tera Jhooth Bhi To Qubool Hai
Accha Bura Kya Tolna
Kya Mashwara Kya Sochna
Mahboob Hota Hai Khuda
Yahi Ishq Ka To Usool Hai

snippet.description:
You voted for it. Time to take on 5 hunters. The hunters are back and better than ever. Will we AT LAST move on to 6 hunters?

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there is FIVE hunters. The 6th rendition of the 5 hunters series, the revival...

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friends George and Sapnap and BadBoyHalo and Antfrost  and Awesamdude try to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

(Most) Music is from: @dreamproductionsXD

snippet.title: Manung Kotaima - Badri Sapkota | Shanti Shree Pariyar | Juna Gurung | New Nepali Song
snippet.description:
Presenting new Nepali song Manung Kotaima by Badri Sapkota & Shanti Shree Pariyar, penned & composed by Badri Sapkota, featuring Badri Sapkota & Juna Gurung only on Badri Sapkota's official YouTube channel.

Badri Sapkota Presents: New Nepali Song 2082

|| Manung Kotaima ||

Roshan Devkota
Sarjan Thapa Magar / Puran Magar & Team
Shailesh Sunam & Umbrella Resort, Manungkot

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

Rabb maan liya tujhko 
Jagg maan liya tujhko 
Tu he hai dunia meri 
Sabb maan liya tujhko,,

Maanga  jo paaya vahi  ,,

Dekh tere dil may 
Dil may dil may 
Dil may dil may yaara  toh nhi
Mai khogea khogea khogea khogea yaara hu kahi ,,

Bachkay ray bachkay deewane,,
Tu naino kay khel na jaane ,,


Tu meri jaan hai yaara ,,
Tu he hai jaan say pyara ,,
Sunali ve Sunlai ve dildara
Dhadkan banke rehna yaara ,,
Apna mujhey kehna yaara ,
Sunali ve Sunlai ve dildara ,

Tujhey yaar kahay
Jisay pyaar kahay 
Humey toh hogea hai vahi , 

Dekh tere dil may 
Dil may dil may 
Dil may dil may yaara  toh nhi
Mai khogea khogea ,,
khogea khogea khogea yaara hu kahi ,,

#teredilmein #elvishyadav #elvish #jannat #jannatzubair #ritoriba

snippet.title: Lord Huron - The Night We Met (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
вПђ Download / Stream: 
http://smarturl.it/iLHStrangeTrails

вЪ°пЄП Lord Huron:
https://www.instagram.com/lordhuron
https://www.facebook.com/lordhuron
https://x.com/lordhuron

вЪ°пЄП Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Intro]
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)
(Ooh, ooh, ooh)

[Verse 1]
I am not the only traveler
Who has not repaid his debt
I've been searching for a trail to follow again
Take me back to the night we met
And then I can tell myself
What the hell I'm supposed to do
And then I can tell myself
Not to ride along with you

[Chorus]
I had all and then most of you
Some and now none of you
Take me back to the night we met
I don't know what I'm supposed to do
Haunted by the ghost of you
Oh, take me back to the night we met

[Verse 2]
When the night was full of terrors
And your eyes were filled with tears
When you had not touched me yet
Oh, take me back to the night we met

[Chorus]
I had all and then most of you
Some and now none of you
Take me back to the night we met
I don't know what I'm supposed to do
Haunted by the ghost of you
Take me back to the night we met

snippet.title: а§Еа§≤а•На§≤а§Ња§∞а•З а§®а§Ња§®а•А а§Ха•За§Єа•А "Allare Nani Kesi" Yubaraj Portel(Cover Remake) | Old is Gold | Music Nepal
snippet.description:
Experience a fresh take on the timeless Nepali folk classic, "Allare Nani Kesi." Originally composed and sung by the legendary Jhalakman Gandharva, this remake version is beautifully reimagined by Yubaraj Portel only on Music Nepal's Official YouTube Channel.

This version brings modern production while keeping the soulful essence of the Sarangi and the traditional Gandharva roots alive for a new generation.

"а§Еа§≤а•На§≤а§Ња§∞а•З а§®а§Ња§®а•А" (Allare Nani Kesi) а§Па§Йа§Яа§Њ а§Ха§Ња§≤а§Ьа§ѓа•А а§®а•За§™а§Ња§≤а•А а§≤а•Ла§Х а§Ча•Аа§§ а§єа•Ла•§  а§ѓа•Ба§µа§∞а§Ња§Ь а§™а•Ла§∞а•На§Яа•За§≤а§Ха•Л а§∞а§ња§Ѓа•За§Х а§Єа§Ва§Єа•На§Ха§∞а§£ а§∞ а§Эа§≤а§Ха§Ѓа§Ња§® а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§µа§Ха•Л а§Ѓа•Ма§≤а§ња§Х (Original) а§Єа§Ва§Єа•На§Ха§∞а§£а§Ѓа§Њ,

This folk melody reflects the culture, tradition, and heartfelt emotions of Nepali villages. A perfect combination of soulful lyrics, traditional instruments, and rhythmic beats.
Enjoy the real taste of Nepali Lok Geet Dohori and regional music heritage. Celebrate the spirit of Nepal through Music NepalвАЩs timeless Lok Geet collection, bringing together authentic Nepali folk sounds. Experience soulful traditional music with rich melodies and heartfelt folk emotions.  A beautiful blend of lok dohori and classic traditional rhythms that portray love, devotion, culture, and village life.  

вАҐ Song Title: Allare Nani Kesi

вАҐ Original Singer/Composer/Lyricist: Jhalakman Gandharva

вАҐ Remake Vocals: Yubaraj Portel

вАҐ Arranger: Binod Kumar Bhujel

вАҐ Studio = Music Nepal 

вАҐ Record = Nakul Karki 

вАҐ Mixing/ Mastering = Prakash Kharel, Gobinda Soni 

вАҐ Special help = Monika Chudal 

вАҐ Genre: Nepali Folk / Fusion

Video credits 
вАҐ Cast: Asha B.C.
          Bikki Portel
          Raju Singh 

вАҐ Co- Artist:
                  Raju century 
                  Bikram gahatraj 
                  Sunill dhamala
                  Nabin (Gold King) 
                  Sujan comrade 
                  N.B. Narayan Ghimire 
                  Shambhu lagun 

Special thanks -  Subash Khadka 

вАҐ Makeup: Poonam Chaudhary
вАҐ Light:
¬†¬†¬†¬†¬† Ramesh Parajuli 
¬†¬†¬†¬†¬† Harka Pahari 
¬†¬†¬†¬†¬† Anish mager 
вАҐ Cinematography: Dinesh¬†Parajuli

вАҐ Producer: Trisha / Aryan 
вАҐ Choreographer: Shyam Pattel

snippet.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man (Lyrical Video) | Sonu Nigam | Alka Yagnik Anu Malik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" from the film Chori Chori Chupke Chupke is a melodious romantic track sung by Sonu Nigam and Alka Yagnik, with music composed by Anu Malik. Featuring Salman Khan and Rani Mukerji, the song captures the fluttering emotions of love, innocence, and heartfelt longing. With its soothing melody, expressive vocals, and early-2000s Bollywood charm, this track remains a memorable and evergreen romantic favorite. 

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Alka Yagnik
Music: Anu Malik
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
Starring: Salman Khan, Rani Mukerji
Director: Abbas Mustan
Producer: Nazim Rizvi
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Deewana Hain Yeh Man Kyon Pagal Hai Dhadkan 

Kyon Tujhpe Mujhe Pyaar Aaya Hai 

Yeh Mausam Kyon Saje Yeh Payal Kyon Baje 

Yeh Kaisa Khumar Chhaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Maine Teri Dhadkanon Pe Sanam 

Apni Wafa Ki Kahani Likhi 

Maine Tere Naam Jaan-e-Jigar 

Apni Haseen Zindagani Likhi 

Yeh Kajal Kyon Hase, Yeh Naina Kyon Jhuke 

Yeh Kaisa Nikhar Mujhpe Aaya Hain 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

Dil Tera Mera Dil Jhoome Re Jhoome 

O Mere Rabba Tera Shukriya 

Jo Maine Maanga Mujhe Mil Gaya 

Meri Mohabbat Asar Kar Gayi 

Khwabon Ka Mehka Chaman Khil Gaya 

Yeh Bandhan Kyon Bandhe, Yeh Rishte Kyon Jude 

Yeh Mausam Kya Sandesha Laaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane 

Is Baat Ko Koi Kya Jaane 

Deewana Hain Yeh Man Kyon Pagal Hai Dhadkan 

Kyon Tujhpe Mujhe Pyaar Aaya Hai 

Yeh Mausam Kyon Saje Yeh Payal Kyon Baje 

Yeh Kaisa Khumar Chhaya Hai 

Koi Bata De Koi Bata De Koi Bataye Na 

Yeh Main Janoon Ya Tu Jaane

en.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man (Lyrical Video) | Sonu Nigam | Alka Yagnik Anu Malik | Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
en.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" from the film Chori Chori Chupke Chupke is a melodious romantic track sung by Sonu Nigam and Alka Yagnik, with music composed by Anu Malik. Featuring Salman Khan and Rani Mukerji, the song captures the fluttering emotions of love, innocence, and heartfelt longing. With its soothing melody, expressive vocals, and early-2000s Bollywood charm, this track remains a memorable and evergreen romantic favorite.

Movie: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke

snippet.title: 2 Minecraft Pros VS 1000 Hunters
snippet.description:
On the Unstable SMP, LettuceK is currently beating every other candidate in the election by 6,000 votes. The only way to beat him, is to bring Wemmbu back to spawn and prove that he's been lying this whole time. This is 2 Minecraft Pros VS 1000 Hunters. 

Unstable SMP:
вЮЬ вА™  @wemmbumc 
вЮЬ вА™  @FlameFragsMC 
вЮЬ вА™  @Spokeishere 
вЮЬ вА™  @ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @wemmbumc @LettuceK @TheobaldTheBird @CoinMonkeExtras @PurpledMC @Boosfer 

Original music by  @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

snippet.title: YABI - AJAVOLI ft. BLUESSS ( OFFICIAL AUDIO )
snippet.description:
Track 2 from the BOOMERANG mixtape, вАЬAjavoliвАЭ featuring Bluesss, delivers smooth melodies and emotional storytelling. A song about love, reflection, and feelings that never fade, this track shows a softer but powerful side of Yabi The Goat.


Heartfelt thanks to RACHANA DAHAL  for the beautiful back vocals. Your voice added depth, emotion, and soul to this track. Truly grateful for your support and talent.

вАШAjavoliвАЩ is inspired by the original song by Sudip Giri. The emotions, melody, and soul of the original track sparked a new creative direction, allowing this version to reflect personal experiences while honoring the essence and artistry of the original work. Much respect to Sudip Giri for the inspiration.вАЭ


вДЧ 2026 Yabi The Goat. All rights reserved. Unauthorized use or re-upload of this content is prohibited.

A bank robbery in Mumbai leaves manager Rahul as the sole victim of a planned attack. As CID investigates, they uncover a web of betting addiction, abductor, and betrayal involving Rahul, his sister-in-law Kanchan, and others.

Show Name: CID Season 2 
Episode: 8
Cast: Shivaji Satam, Dayanand Shetty, Aditya Srivastava, Ansha Sayed, Ajay Nagrath, Saumya Saraswat, Narendra Gupta, Parul Rai

About CID:
-----------------
India's favourite crime thriller show is back! Abhijeet, Daya and other CID officers, led by ACP Pradyuman, join forces with forensic expert Dr Salunkhe to track down the perpetrators who have committed heinous crimes, using every small clue they can find. 'CID' stars Shivaji Satam, Dayanand Shetty, Aditya Srivastava and Narendra Gupta.

Click here to enjoy full episodes of your favorite show CID 2.0:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLzufeTFnhupxRXGzY2in5Z6fjmU_td4QF

snippet.title: Spending $8,539,693 For The GALACTIO FANTASMA..
snippet.description:
Today I spent alot of robux for alien lucky blocks in escape tsunami for brainrots. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens. 

FOLTYN MERCH: https://foltyn.shop/

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/1177555...

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/foltynn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. ItвАЩs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: ROAD TO 126 OVR Begins!
snippet.description:
The road to 126 OVR continues! Today, I finally assemble the dream trio: 117 Lionel Messi, 117 Cristiano Ronaldo, and 117 Ruud Gullit.

In this video, I go all-in on the TOTY Draft Packs to hunt down the best attackers in the game. My pack luck was absolutely insane. I packed 117 Cristiano Ronaldo and 117 Lionel Messi in the same recording session!

After securing the attack, I moved to the Defenders pack to find Ruud Gullit. It was a struggle (so many Van Dijk duplicates!), but we finally completed the squad.

рЯФ• PACK OPENING HIGHLIGHTS:

PACKED 117 CRISTIANO RONALDO (The Suii!) рЯЗµрЯЗє

PACKED 117 LIONEL MESSI (The Goat!) рЯЗ¶рЯЗЈ

PACKED 117 VIRGIL VAN DIJK (Multiple times!) рЯЗ≥рЯЗ±

Completing the Ruud Gullit Exchange вЬЕ

Reaching 125 OVR & Gameplay рЯОЃ

рЯУ© Business Inquiries вЖТ *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX вАФ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything вАФ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer вАЬCapture the FlagвАЭ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (вАЬRobuxвАЭ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Wassup Gamers,

Today I will be playing a psychological horror game where a creepy horrific entity wants me to open my eyes and I MUST NOT OPEN THEM. (Don't) Open Your Eyes.
(Don't) Open Your Eyes is a horror game where you're sleeping and some possible monster whispers into your ear and really wants you to open your eyes. It's in your best interest to open your eyes.

Unstable SMP:
вЮЬ  @ParrotX2

вЮЬ  @wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @ParrotX2 @LettuceK @PurpledMC @Boosfer 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)
